data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for approval deadlines and escalation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Approval deadlines and escalation'. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the system implements this requirement. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks concrete evidence of how approval deadlines and escalation are managed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of approval deadlines and escalation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
